commands.repair_reason: Queue a focused repair on the PR branch because the remaining blockers are concrete: protect owner delete on already hidden skills and add the required changelog entry.; Needs attention: The diff narrows owner restore permissions but still leaves a concrete owner-controlled moderation bypass through the delete path.; Review finding: [P1] Block owner delete from rewriting hidden provenance — convex/skills.ts:8257-825... commands.review_summary:
The PR tightens Convex skill soft-delete/undelete authorization, adds owner-undelete tests and HTTP 403 formatting, records audit actor role metadata, resets VT hide provenance, and removes an unused slug validator export.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection gives a high-confidence path: on PR head, an owner can DELETE an already moderation-hidden skill, which stamps hiddenBy to the owner and clears moderationReason, then POST undelete passes the owner-initiated gate.
